items.title_en: Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only
items.title_zh: 微软：Copilot 仅供娱乐用途
items.summary_en: Microsoft: Microsoft has added prominent disclaimers to Copilot stating it is intended for entertainment purposes only, distancing the product from enterprise reliability expectations. The move reflects growing legal caution around AI assistant liability and accuracy, particularly as AI tools are increasingly used in professional contexts.
items.summary_zh: 微软：微软为 Copilot 添加显著免责声明，表示该产品仅供娱乐用途，与企业级可靠性预期划清界限。此举反映出围绕 AI 助手法律责任与准确性的日益谨慎，尤其是在 AI 工具被广泛用于专业场景的背景下。

items.title_en: Anthropic: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
items.title_zh: Anthropic：Claude Code 用户触达用量限额的速度远超预期
items.summary_en: The Register: Anthropic has acknowledged that Claude Code users are hitting usage limits significantly faster than the company anticipated. The surge reflects strong adoption of its agentic coding tool but has also surfaced latent bugs that silently multiply API costs by 10-20x, causing billing surprises for some users.
items.summary_zh: The Register：Anthropic 承认 Claude Code 用户触达用量限额的速度远超预期，反映出其智能编码工具的强劲需求。与此同时，已发现隐性 Bug 可将 API 成本悄然放大 10-20 倍，导致部分用户账单异常。

items.title_en: AI data centres can warm surrounding areas by up to 9.1 degrees C
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心可使周边区域气温升高最多 9.1 摄氏度
items.summary_en: New Scientist: A new study finds that the massive heat output from AI data centres can raise temperatures in surrounding areas by up to 9.1 degrees Celsius. As AI infrastructure scales globally, researchers warn of localized climate impacts on communities near large compute clusters, adding environmental scrutiny to the AI buildout.
items.summary_zh: New Scientist：新研究发现，AI 数据中心产生的大量废热可使周边区域气温升高最多 9.1 摄氏度。随着 AI 基础设施在全球快速扩张，研究人员警告大型计算集群附近社区将面临局部气候影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pardus Browser - a browser for AI agents without Chromium
items.title_zh: Pardus Browser：专为 AI 智能体打造的非 Chromium 浏览器
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An open-source project introduces Pardus Browser, a lightweight browser built specifically for AI agents that avoids the overhead of Chromium. Designed to give agents clean, controllable web access, it aims to reduce resource consumption and improve determinism for automated browser-based AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开源项目 Pardus Browser 发布，专为 AI 智能体打造，绕开 Chromium 的庞大体积。该浏览器旨在为智能体提供轻量、可控的网页访问能力，降低资源消耗，提升自动化浏览器工作流的确定性。

items.title_en: The Inference Shift – How Cheap Chips Could Put Frontier AI in Everyone's Hands
items.title_zh: 推理转型：廉价芯片如何让前沿 AI 走进千家万户
items.summary_en: Analysis: An in-depth analysis argues that falling inference chip costs are about to democratize access to frontier AI models. As specialized inference hardware becomes commoditized, the author predicts a shift where running powerful models locally or cheaply in the cloud becomes widely accessible within 1-2 years.
items.summary_zh: 分析：一篇深度分析文章指出，推理芯片成本的快速下降即将打破前沿 AI 的访问壁垒。随着专用推理硬件进入大规模量产阶段，作者预测在 1-2 年内，在本地或低价云端运行强大模型将成为普遍可及的能力。

items.title_en: Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens
items.title_zh: 通用 Claude.md——大幅削减 Claude 输出 Token
items.summary_en: Community: A GitHub repository proposes a universal Claude.md configuration that significantly reduces Claude's output token usage. The approach applies prompt-level instructions to suppress verbosity and redundant formatting, helping developers cut API costs. Gained 293 upvotes on Hacker News.
items.summary_zh: 社区：一个 GitHub 仓库提出通用 Claude.md 配置方案，通过提示级指令抑制冗余输出，有效降低 Claude API Token 消耗，帮助开发者节省成本。该帖在 Hacker News 获得 293 点赞。

items.title_en: Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context
items.title_zh: Google 发布 2 亿参数时序基础模型，支持 16k 上下文
items.summary_en: Google Research: Google Research released TimesFM, a 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context length. The model achieves strong zero-shot forecasting across diverse domains including finance, weather, and energy, available open-source on GitHub.
items.summary_zh: Google Research：Google Research 发布 TimesFM，一个拥有 2 亿参数和 16k 上下文长度的时序基础模型。该模型在金融、天气、能源等多领域展现出强大的零样本预测能力，已在 GitHub 开源。

items.title_en: Claude usage limits hitting faster than expected
items.title_zh: Claude 用量上限比预期更快触达
items.summary_en: Community: A Reddit thread on r/ClaudeCode reports that Claude API usage limits are being reached faster than anticipated by developers. Users discuss patterns in token consumption and strategies to manage limits, reflecting growing adoption of Claude in production coding workflows.
items.summary_zh: 社区：Reddit r/ClaudeCode 帖子报告称开发者比预期更快触达 Claude API 用量上限。用户讨论 Token 消耗规律及管理策略，反映 Claude 在生产编程工作流中的使用量快速增长。

items.title_en: Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview
items.title_zh: Ollama 预览版开始使用 Apple MLX 加速
items.summary_en: Ollama: Ollama announced a preview of MLX-powered inference on Apple Silicon, enabling significantly faster local LLM performance on Mac devices. The integration leverages Apple's MLX framework to accelerate model execution natively on M-series chips.
items.summary_zh: Ollama：Ollama 宣布在 Apple Silicon 上推出基于 MLX 框架的推理加速预览版本，大幅提升 Mac 本地大模型运行速度。该功能充分利用苹果 M 系列芯片的神经引擎，为本地 AI 推理带来显著性能提升。

items.title_en: GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash
items.title_zh: GitHub 撤回决定，取消 Copilot PR 广告植入
items.summary_en: GitHub: GitHub reversed its controversial decision to embed promotional content into Copilot pull request descriptions after significant backlash from developers. The feature had drawn criticism for mixing AI suggestions with advertising. GitHub confirmed the rollback following community pressure.
items.summary_zh: GitHub：在开发者强烈反对后，GitHub 撤回了将推广内容嵌入 Copilot PR 描述的争议性决定。该功能因将 AI 建议与广告混合而饱受批评，GitHub 在社区压力下确认回滚。

items.title_en: Claude Code bug can silently 10-20x API costs
items.title_zh: Claude Code 缓存 Bug 可导致 API 费用暴增 10-20 倍
items.summary_en: Community: A Reddit post flagged two cache-related bugs in Claude Code that can silently inflate API costs by 10-20x without any warning to the user. The bugs affect how prompt caching is handled, causing repeated full-context charges instead of cached responses.
items.summary_zh: 社区：Reddit 上的一篇帖子披露了 Claude Code 中两个与缓存相关的 Bug，可在用户毫不知情的情况下使 API 费用暴涨 10-20 倍。漏洞导致提示缓存失效，每次请求均按完整上下文计费而非使用缓存价格。

items.title_en: Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model
items.title_zh: Mr. Chatterbox：以维多利亚时代伦理训练的 AI 模型
items.summary_en: Simon Willison: Simon Willison writes about Mr. Chatterbox, a language model fine-tuned on Victorian-era texts and ethical frameworks. The experiment explores how training data period and cultural context shape model behavior and responses, offering insights into the relationship between data curation and AI alignment.
items.summary_zh: Simon Willison：Simon Willison 介绍了 Mr. Chatterbox——一个基于维多利亚时代文本和伦理框架微调的语言模型。该实验探索训练数据时代背景如何塑造模型行为，为理解数据筛选与 AI 对齐的关系提供了新视角。

items.title_en: Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry
items.title_zh: Claude Code 源代码因 NPM 注册表中的 map 文件泄露
items.summary_en: Community: A security researcher discovered that Claude Code's minified source code was inadvertently exposed via source map files published to the NPM registry. The leak revealed internal implementation details of Anthropic's coding agent, raising questions about supply chain security practices.
items.summary_zh: 社区：一名安全研究人员发现，Claude Code 的压缩源代码通过发布到 NPM 注册表的 source map 文件意外泄露。此次泄露暴露了 Anthropic 编码智能体的内部实现细节，引发对软件供应链安全实践的质疑。

items.title_en: Emerging Litigation Risks in Financing AI Data Centers Boom
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心融资热潮中的新兴诉讼风险
items.summary_en: Quinn Emanuel: Law firm Quinn Emanuel publishes a client alert outlining emerging litigation risks associated with the AI data center financing boom. Topics covered include contract disputes, regulatory exposure, environmental challenges, and lender liability in infrastructure deals. Relevant for investors and developers in the AI infrastructure space.
items.summary_zh: Quinn Emanuel：律师事务所 Quinn Emanuel 发布客户提示，梳理 AI 数据中心融资热潮中的新兴诉讼风险，涵盖合同纠纷、监管敞口、环境挑战及基础设施交易中的出借方责任，对 AI 基础设施投资者和开发商具有参考价值。

items.title_zh: 黄仁勋也站台的抱抱脸机器人卖爆了，背后公司竟来自中国
items.summary_zh: 量子位：HuggingFace推出的低成本开源机器人因获得英伟达CEO黄仁勋公开背书而引爆市场，其背后核心硬件供应商来自中国深圳。该机器人凭借开源生态和低价策略正在成为开发者构建具身智能应用的首选平台。

items.title_zh: 实测Qwen3.5-Omni：摄像头一开，AI给我现场讲论文、撸代码
items.summary_zh: 量子位：量子位实测阿里最新发布的Qwen3.5-Omni多模态模型，该模型在215项基准测试中达到SOTA。测试表明其实时视觉理解能力出色，可通过摄像头即时解析论文内容、辅助编程，多模态交互体验接近GPT-4o水平。

items.title_zh: 2700GB高质量数据，训出空间智能SOTA，背后秘诀全栈开源
items.summary_zh: 量子位：研究团队基于2700GB高质量3D空间数据训练出空间智能模型，在多项空间理解基准上达到SOTA。团队全栈开源数据集、训练代码及模型权重，为具身智能和机器人领域研究提供重要基础设施。

items.title_en: Safeguarding cryptocurrency by disclosing quantum vulnerabilities responsibly
items.title_zh: 负责任地披露量子漏洞以保护加密货币安全
items.summary_en: Google Research: Google Research has published a responsible disclosure of quantum computing vulnerabilities in elliptic curve cryptography used by major cryptocurrencies. The post outlines the timeline and methodology for coordinating with affected parties before publication, setting a precedent for how quantum threats to financial infrastructure should be handled.
items.summary_zh: Google Research：谷歌研究院就主流加密货币所用椭圆曲线密码学中的量子漏洞进行了负责任披露，阐述了在发布前与相关方协调的时间线与方法论，为量子威胁金融基础设施的处理方式树立了先例。

items.title_zh: 机器人线下真机对线打PK！这届黑客松可太会玩了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：一场以人形机器人为主角的线下黑客松活动引发热议，参赛者携带真实机器人现场竞技，展示了抓取、操控、运动等多项能力。活动显示机器人开发门槛快速降低，开发者社区活跃度显著提升。

items.title_zh: 瑞声科技公开人形机器人感知解决方案，释放机器人业务加速落地信号
items.summary_zh: 量子位：声学元件巨头瑞声科技正式公开其人形机器人感知系统，涵盖触觉、听觉等多传感器融合方案。此举被视为该公司加速布局机器人硬件供应链的重要信号，有望进一步推动人形机器人规模化落地。
